text: Scrambled eggs with smoked turkey on the side.
_comment: HARD COMBINED: Two items, both need variant + category. 'egg (scrambled)' → variant 'scrambled egg' is the USDA exact phrase; category hint dairy & eggs prevents landing on egg-based sauces or egg salad. 'turkey (smoked)' → variant 'smoked turkey' is exact USDA; category hint poultry prevents landing on smoked sausage or pork cold cuts. Without both features, the smoked turkey match is at high risk of returning pork products.
